tasks.label: Build and Run Active C++ File
tasks.command: $ext = '${fileExtname}'; if (@('.cpp','.cc','.cxx','.c') -contains $ext) { $src = '${file}'; $exe = '${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe'; $needsBuild = !(Test-Path $exe) -or ((Get-Item $src).LastWriteTime -gt (Get-Item $exe).LastWriteTime); if ($needsBuild) { g++ "$src" -std=c++17 -O2 -o "$exe"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; & "$exe" } else { Write-Host "Open a .cpp/.cc/.cxx/.c file first, then run this task." }
